message:
Fix critical bugs: unsigned overflow, zero-copy Buffer, zlib fallback, batch commits

- readUint32BE: use >>> 0 to avoid signed overflow when high bit is set
- Buffer.from: zero-copy view (buffer, offset, length) instead of copying
- decompressObject: add node:zlib fallback matching readObject's behavior
- indexNewCommits: batch reads via readObjects() instead of N+1 individual reads
- collectObjects: add 500K object limit to prevent unbounded BFS walks
- indexNewCommits: add 10K commit limit to prevent unbounded walks
- Docs: fix endpoint count from "35+"/"30+" to actual 29

files.patch:
@@ -113,7 +113,7 @@ Key optimizations:
 | Diff | Supported |
 | Blame (via libgit2) | Supported |
 | Commit history / log | Supported |
-| REST API (35+ endpoints) | Supported |
+| REST API (29 endpoints) | Supported |
 | SSH transport | Supported |
 | Server-side merge (ff + 3-way) | Supported |
 | Cherry-pick / revert / reset | Supported |

@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ import { Card, CardGrid } from "@astrojs/starlight/components";
     Smart HTTP transport and SSH-to-HTTP proxy. Works with standard `git clone`, `git push`, `git fetch` over both HTTP and SSH.
   </Card>
   <Card title="REST API" icon="setting">
-    30+ endpoints for programmatic access. Init repos, commit files, create branches, merge, cherry-pick, revert — all via JSON.
+    29 endpoints for programmatic access. Init repos, commit files, create branches, merge, cherry-pick, revert — all via JSON.
   </Card>
   <Card title="Zig WASM Engine" icon="rocket">
     SHA-1 hashing, zlib compression, packfile parsing, delta encoding — all in Zig compiled to WASM with SIMD acceleration.
